description_long: This is a roughly triangular, medium-sized stone with a natural, irregular shape and a prominent, shallow paw print impression on one of its broadest faces. The stone's surface is predominantly a sandy beige with subtle gradients of light brown and pale yellow, especially around the carved area. Its texture appears coarse and grainy, with visible granular inclusions and a matte, unpolished finish. The edges are uneven and slightly rounded, suggesting some degree of weathering but not extensive erosion. The paw print detail is clearly defined, indicating it may have been intentionally carved or pressed into the stone. This object would stand out in an urban park or garden, serving as a decorative or commemorative feature.
description: A coarse, beige stone with an engraved paw print and a rough, natural texture. Its irregular shape and carved detail make it visually distinctive.
description_view_0: The main face displays a clear paw print impression surrounded by a sandy beige surface with subtle yellowish tones.
description_view_1: This angled side view highlights the stone's thickness and rough, grainy texture, with no visible carvings.
description_view_2: The rear face shows a more uniform, flat surface with a mix of light brown and beige, lacking any distinct markings.
description_view_3: This view reveals the paw print from an oblique angle and emphasizes the stone's irregular, angular profile.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on the ground
attribute_pattern: Features a single, shallow paw print impression with subtle color variation around the carved area; otherwise, the surface is mottled and grainy.
attribute_weathering: Moderately weathered with a rough, unpolished surface and slightly rounded edges, indicating some exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts gently with manicured lawns or paved paths, but can blend with other natural stones or landscaping elements in a park setting.
